title: RemovePhantoms
description: A simple mod that removes phantoms from Minecraft and allows you to craft Phantom Membranes.
body:
RemovePhantoms is a lightweight Minecraft mod that makes nights peaceful again.
Phantoms will no longer spawn, so you can explore or build at night without being disturbed.

But don’t worry about missing out on Phantom Membranes!
This mod also adds a crafting recipe for Phantom Membranes, so you can still repair your Elytra and brew potions without having to deal with phantoms.

Perfect for players who:
- Hate being interrupted by phantoms
- Prefer peaceful or exploration-focused gameplay
- Still want access to Phantom Membranes in survival

Features:
- Completely removes phantom spawns
- Adds a simple crafting recipe for Phantom Membranes
- Lightweight and compatible with most other mods

All my mods are completely free to use.
If you'd like to support development, consider buying me a coffee!
☕ https://ko-fi.com/nekozame_garo
